Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

Class FormulaTranslator

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.DefaultTypeCheckingRewriter
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.FormulaTranslator
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITypeCheckingRewriter
public class FormulaTranslator extends DefaultTypeCheckingRewriter
Translates a formula to some target factory. Most of the work is done by the super class. The only special case to handle is a bound identifier declaration whose name becomes a reserved keyword.
